function.content:
---
record_type: invoice
invoice_number: INV-0003
alias: northstar_backfill_gamma
issued_on: 2025-12-23
total_eur: 530
counterparty: Nordstern Finanzsoftware GmbH
project: Northstar Ledger
related_entity: Nina Schreiber
lines:
  - item: operator workflow discovery sprint
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 185
    line_eur: 185
  - item: follow-up timeline prototype review
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 240
    line_eur: 240
  - item: buyer-language refinement memo
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 105
    line_eur: 105
---
# Northstar buyer-language sprint invoice

```text
+----------------+-------------------------------+
| field          | value                         |
+----------------+-------------------------------+
| record_type    | invoice                       |
| invoice_number | INV-0003                      |
| alias          | northstar_backfill_gamma      |
| issued_on      | 2025-12-23                    |
| total_eur      | 530                           |
| counterparty   | Nordstern Finanzsoftware GmbH |
| project        | Northstar Ledger              |
| related_entity | Nina Schreiber                |
+----------------+-------------------------------+
```

## Line Items

```text
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| # | item                                | qty | unit_eur | line_eur |
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| 1 | operator workflow discovery sprint  | 1   | 185      | 185      |
| 2 | follow-up timeline prototype review | 1   | 240      | 240      |
| 3 | buyer-language refinement memo      | 1   | 105      | 105      |
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
|   | TOTAL                               |     |          | 530      |
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
```

## Notes

A backfilled invoice from the period when Miles was trying to make the language sound like one product instead of three.

next_step.current_state: Invoice OCR frontmatter write succeeded. Reactive outbox verification was not applicable because this was a finance record write, not an outbox communication. Continue task by migrating second requested bill record.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Write frontmatter into purchase bill record preserving body verbatim
next_step.observation: First target invoice file was updated successfully with schema-shaped frontmatter and preserved original body.

function.message: Done. I processed the next inbox item by running the two requested finance documents through the OCR/frontmatter workflow: both now have schema-compliant YAML frontmatter extracted from visible note content, with original bodies preserved verbatim. I then deleted the processed inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Completed mandatory bootstrap (tree, AGENTS, context), read nested AGENTS in entered folders, followed process-next-inbox-item + OCR + migration + finance schema guidance, preserved body text during frontmatter insertion, and removed inbox item only after successful structured-record maintenance per inbox-processing-v2-update.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request explicitly asked to OCR two finance records. Both target files were read and contained all required visible fields/line items for their schemas; frontmatter was added at the top of each file using required invoice/bill fields from finance-record-frontmatter.md, with line values matching source tables and original note bodies preserved. Since work completed successfully, deleting the processed inbox file is required by inbox-processing-v2-update.md and process-next-inbox-item.md.
